description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Update Donors that runs daily on a schedule and can be manually triggered. The workflow checks if the repository owner is 'cpeditor', then in an ubuntu-latest job, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs the requests library, updates donors using a Python script with a GITHUB_TOKEN from secrets, checks for changes, and if changes exist, creates a pull request with a specific commit message, title, and branch.
